summary: Quote Creation Simplification testing completed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: Fixed critical bug where quotes list showed '0 quotes' despite API returning 100 quotes. Root cause: QuotesPage was calling non-existent adminApi.getSettings() method. Fixed by changing to adminApi.getBusinessSettings(). All core features verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: Quotes list showed '0 quotes' despite API returning data. Root cause: adminApi.getSettings() method doesn't exist, causing silent error.
Status and Actions columns are cut off on the right side of the table. Table needs horizontal scroll or responsive design fix.

issues: Table columns (Status, Actions) cut off on right side - needs horizontal scroll or responsive fix

critical_code_review_comments: QuotesPage.jsx line 63: Changed adminApi.getSettings() to adminApi.getBusinessSettings() - the getSettings method doesn't exist in adminApi.js
SystemItemSelector.jsx: Prices are correctly displayed as read-only <div> elements, not editable inputs. Sales can only change quantity.
Price request endpoint POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests works correctly for unpriced items
Discount request endpoint POST /api/staff/discount-requests works correctly for sent quotes
seed_data_creation: Test quotes created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quote creation simplification features verified. Key changes: 1) SystemItemSelector prices are READ-ONLY (div not input), 2) Unpriced items show 'Needs Pricing' badge and 'Request Price from Vendor Ops' button, 3) Quotes with unpriced items save as 'waiting_for_pricing' status, 4) Discount request button visible for 'sent' quotes. Fixed QuotesPage bug where quotes weren't loading due to missing adminApi.getSettings() method.

quotes_page_renders.details: QuotesPage /admin/quotes renders with Create Quote button, search, and quotes table

customer_selection.details: Customer dropdown loads existing customers, 'New client' toggle shows minimal form fields

system_item_selector.details: Searches catalog products, prices are READ-ONLY (div not input), quantity is editable

needs_pricing_badge.details: Items without price show 'Needs Pricing' badge in search results and line items

request_price_button.details: 'Request Price from Vendor Ops' button creates price request via POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests

quote_creation.details: Create Quote button works, creates quote via POST /api/admin/quotes-v2

waiting_for_pricing_status.details: Quotes with unpriced items save as 'waiting_for_pricing' status

discount_request_button.details: 'Request Discount' button visible for sent quotes, calls POST /api/staff/discount-requests

status_badges.details: Status badges show correctly: draft, waiting for pricing, sent, approved, etc.

send_button_disabled.details: Send button not shown for waiting_for_pricing quotes, shows 'Awaiting Vendor Ops' badge instead

backend_api_tests: Quote with waiting_for_pricing status workflow - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: QuotesPage loads with Create Quote button - VERIFIED
New client form shows minimal fields - VERIFIED
Prices are READ-ONLY (div not input) - VERIFIED
'Needs Pricing' badge shown for unpriced items - VERIFIED
'Request Price from Vendor Ops' button works - VERIFIED
Quote creation with priced items - VERIFIED
Quote creation with unpriced items (waiting_for_pricing) - VERIFIED
Quotes list displays 100 quotes - VERIFIED (after fix)
Send buttons visible for draft/ready_to_send - VERIFIED
Discount request buttons visible for sent quotes - VERIFIED
'Awaiting Vendor Ops' badge for waiting_for_pricing - VERIFIED

bug_fixed.description: QuotesPage showed '0 quotes' despite API returning 100 quotes
bug_fixed.root_cause: QuotesPage.jsx line 63 called adminApi.getSettings() which doesn't exist in adminApi.js. This caused a silent error that was caught but prevented the quotes state from being updated.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed adminApi.getSettings() to adminApi.getBusinessSettings() and added console.error logging for debugging
